projects.title: My website
projects.description: This website you are currently on! It was built using vanilla JavaScript, HTML and SCSS. The code is open source and available on GitHub.

projects.title: Playlist fetcher
projects.description: A Node.js script that fetches songs from a YouTube playlist and outputs a JSON file. It uses the YouTube Data API to fetch video/song details. Currently in development. Soon to be released.

projects.title: BIND DNS
projects.description: BIND DNS server config with proxmox and ansible. I made this for my college IT server management team to use in their working server environment.

projects.title: Language learning app
projects.description: Card based language learning helper application/website. Currently in early development.
